gt_sql: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event GROUP BY T1.event_id HAVING COUNT(T2.link_to_event) > 20 EXCEPT SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1  WHERE T1.type = 'Fundraiser'
pred_sql:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
WHERE e.type != 'Fundraiser'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 20;
question: List all the names of events that had an attendance of over 20 students but were not fundraisers.
